data.title: Delek US Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: DK) welcomes EPA's decision granting over half of pending small refinery exemptions for 2019-2024. CEO lauds move for affordable energy and job creation.
data.description: Delek US Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: DK) headquartered in Brentwood, Tennessee, has acknowledged the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency's favorable move to approve over 50% of their outstanding small refinery exemptions for the duration of 2019-2024. Avigal Soreq, the CEO, expressed satisfaction, stating that these exemptions have resolved a longstanding concern and will support the company in maintaining reasonable energy costs and preserving well-paid employment opportunities in the central regions of the country. The Trump Administration has been appreciated for this decision.

data.title: Mississippi declares public health emergency as infant mortality rates rise, leading the country.
data.description: Yesterday, the Mississippi State Department of Health in Arlington, Va., announced a public health emergency due to a significant increase in infant mortality rates. This comes as the state was already noted for having the highest infant death rates in the country. The organization March of Dimes, a prominent leader in supporting maternal and infant health, is closely monitoring the situation. The alarming rise in infant mortality serves as a pressing concern, with the state witnessing a surge in reported cases, further emphasizing the urgent need for intervention and support to address this critical issue.

data.title: New US bill suggests modern privateers to combat cybercrime, targeting offenses like cryptocurrency theft and ransomware.
data.description: The proposed legislation outlined a range of specific crimes that could be targeted, such as the theft of digital currencies, instances of ransomware attacks, and fraudulent schemes involving the butchering of pigs.

data.title: Banco Comercial Português, S.A. releases interim report on Share Buy-Back Programme transactions.
data.description: Banco Comercial Português, S.A. has released an interim report detailing the transactions carried out as part of their Share Buy-Back Programme. The report provides an overview of the transactions conducted during the specified period, highlighting the total number of shares repurchased, the average purchase price, and the total investment made in the buy-back program. This information allows stakeholders to understand the bank's financial activity and its commitment to enhancing shareholder value through the repurchase of shares.

data.title: Apple and Google are reportedly discussing a Siri-Gemini iPhone deal, potentially boosting Google stock. Talks also include a Meta cloud computing agreement.
data.description: On Friday, the stock of Google experienced an increase as reports surfaced regarding discussions between Apple and Alphabet about a potential deal involving Siri for Gemini iPhone and a cloud computing agreement with Meta. Speculations are growing about the possibility of a significant agreement between Apple and Google, which has caused a surge in Google's stock. The talks highlight the potential impact of collaboration between major tech companies on the market. The news has attracted the attention of investors and industry analysts, with many closely monitoring the situation. The developments suggest a potentially game-changing partnership that could reshape the landscape of tech industry.

data.title: Trump Admin invests $8.9B in Intel as shareholder, struggling chip giant. Reported by Investors Business Daily.
data.description: Intel announced on Friday that the Trump Administration has invested $8.9 billion in the chip company, making them a shareholder. This move comes as Intel faces financial challenges, and it marks a significant development in their stakeholder structure.

data.title: Piedmont Lithium reports successful special meeting, all proposals approved - Aug 22, 2025.
data.description: BELMONT, N.C.-- Piedmont Lithium Inc., a prominent North American provider of lithium products essential to the U.S. electric vehicle sector, disclosed outcomes of its recent Special Stockholders Meeting conducted online on August 22, 2025. At the meeting, shareholders greenlit all propositions put forth by the company. The approval covered all proposals outlined in the proxy statement issued on June 20, 2025. Piedmont Lithium Inc. is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol PLL and on the ASX exchange as PLL.

data.title: BMNR stock surged on Ethereum rally & Powell's remarks, with ETH up 14% and BTC rose 3.76% by Friday.
data.description: Shares of BitMine Immersion Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: BMNR) experienced a surge on Friday as markets responded positively to Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell's cautious comments. BMNR stock saw a significant increase, with cryptocurrency markets also witnessing a notable rally. This surge in digital assets was fueled by Powell's suggestion of potential interest rate reductions. Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) recorded a 14% increase, while Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) saw a rise of 3.76% by the end of trading on Friday. Notably, President Trump's wealth surpassed $5.5 billion after he made $100 million in bond investments during his tenure. Keep up to date with the latest developments on BitMine by visiting Benzinga.com.

data.title: Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacifico issued 85 million bond certificates in Mexico worth Ps. 8.5 billion.
data.description: In Guadalajara, Mexico, on August 22, 2025, Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacífico, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE:PAC; BMV: GAP) disclosed the successful completion of an issuance of 85 million long-term bond certificates in Mexico (Certificados Bursátiles) totaling Ps. 8.5 billion.

data.title: Increased ETH data and growing investor risk appetite may lead to $5,000 Ether price, supported by robust onchain activity and positive market sentiment.
data.description: Increased activity on the blockchain, a strong futures market, and growing investor confidence are all contributing to the likelihood of Ethereum reaching $5,000.

data.title: Nasdaq warns Celularity for not filing its Form 10-Q by deadline, violating listing rule 5250 (c)(1).
data.description: Celularity Inc., a regenerative and cellular medicine company traded on Nasdaq under the symbol CELU, recently disclosed that on August 21, 2025, it was notified by Nasdaq for not submitting its Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the period ending June 30, 2025 on time. This notification indicates that the company is currently in violation of Listing Rule 5250 (c)(1) which mandates timely filing of all necessary periodic financial reports with the Securities and Exchange Commission.

data.title: FCPT acquires Bojangles property for $2.2 million in Tennessee with six years left on lease.
data.description: Mill Valley, CA - Four Corners Property Trust (NYSE:FCPT), a real estate investment trust focusing on high-quality, net-leased restaurant and retail properties, has recently acquired a Bojangles property for $2.2 million. Situated in a robust retail area in Tennessee, the property is run by the corporation under a triple net lease with about six years remaining on the lease term. FCPT is delighted to add this property to its portfolio, further solidifying its presence in the commercial real estate market.

data.title: ETH reaches new all-time high in nearly 4 years following Fed's hints at interest rate cuts.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Ethereum reached a record high, surpassing its previous peak for 2021 following indications from Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell about a potential interest rate reduction.

data.title: Skypoint AI ranks #34 in AI & Data category on 2025 Inc. 5000 List, prestigious ranking of fastest-growing private companies in America.
data.description: On August 22, 2025, in Portland, Oregon, Inc., a prominent media brand catering to entrepreneurs and business leaders, revealed that Skypoint AI has secured a spot on the esteemed Inc. 5000 list. This list recognizes the fastest-growing private companies in America.
